Automated Email Reply & Feedback LoggerAn n8n workflow that triggers on receiving emails from specific senders, generates AI-powered replies using OpenAI GPT, sends email responses via Gmail, and logs both original emails and replies into Google Sheets. Automated YouTube & Google Keyword ResearchAn n8n workflow integrating NocoDB, DataForSEO API, and Social Flood API for automated multi-source keyword generation, filtering, and monthly search volume tracking for YouTube and Google. Ideal for SEO and content marketing automation.Download

Excel to Salesforce Account & Contact SyncAutomates syncing company accounts and contacts from Microsoft Excel to Salesforce using n8n. It reads Excel data, searches Salesforce for existing accounts, merges data, creates new accounts, and upserts contacts via Salesforce API.Download
446
Excel to Salesforce CRM ImporterAutomates importing company and contact data from an Excel spreadsheet into Salesforce. Uses HTTP request to download the file, spreadsheet parsing, Salesforce API to search, create, and update accounts and contacts, deduplicating data along the way.Download
447
Google Firestore CRUD - Create, Update, Getn8n workflow automates document creation, updating, and retrieval in Google Cloud Firestore using Firestore API and OAuth2 credentials. Ideal for backend data management and integration scenarios with Firestore database.Download
448
GitHub Issues Notion SyncAutomates synchronization of GitHub issues with a Notion database using GitHub webhook trigger and Notion API integration in n8n. It creates, updates, archives, and manages issue states inside Notion, enabling seamless issue tracking within a Notion workspace.Download
449
Sync Shopify Customers to Zendesk ContactsAutomates syncing updated customer data from Shopify to Zendesk by matching email addresses, creating new Zendesk users or updating existing ones including phone numbers. Uses Shopify webhook triggers and Zendesk API integration in n8n workflow.Download
450
Shopify to Zendesk Order Ticket SyncAutomates creation and tracking of Zendesk support tickets for updated Shopify orders using Shopify webhook and Zendesk API. Checks existing tickets by order ID to avoid duplicates, creating new tickets for new orders to streamline customer support workflows.Download
451
Zendesk to Slack Ticket SyncAutomates syncing of new Zendesk tickets to Slack threads using Zendesk API and Slack OAuth2. Creates or updates Slack threads with ticket info, keeping support communication organized across platforms.Download
452
Zendesk to Asana Task Sync AutomationAutomates creation and updating of Asana tasks from new Zendesk tickets using Zendesk and Asana APIs via n8n workflow. It checks for existing tasks and appends comments or creates new tasks accordingly, streamlining ticket-to-task management.Download
453
Mautic to Monday.com Contact SyncAutomates contact creation in Monday.com from new Mautic leads using n8n. Integrates Mautic webhook trigger and Monday.com API to sync lead names and emails as board items, enabling CRM task automation and enhanced contact management.Download
454
Shopify to Mautic New Customer SyncAutomates syncing new Shopify customers to Mautic as contacts using Shopify webhook and Mautic API integration in n8n. Ensures first name, last name, and email transfer seamlessly for marketing automation.Download
455
Zendesk to GitHub Issue SyncAutomates syncing Zendesk tickets with GitHub issues by creating issues or comments when new tickets are received. Uses Zendesk API, GitHub API, and n8n workflows for seamless ticket and issue management.Download
456
Zendesk to Jira Issue SynchronizerAutomates synchronization between Zendesk tickets and Jira issues using n8n. It creates Jira issues for new Zendesk tickets or adds comments if an issue exists. Integrates Zendesk API and Jira Cloud API to keep data consistent.Download
457
Automated Email Reply Handling & CRM SyncThis n8n workflow automates email reply categorization using OpenAI, managing leads in Lemlist and HubSpot, and notifying teams via Slack. 458
Sync HubSpot Companies with Zendesk OrganizationsAutomates syncing of recently modified HubSpot companies to Zendesk organizations every 5 mins using HubSpot and Zendesk APIs. Checks if organization exists to update or create. Uses n8n with HubSpot App Token and Zendesk API credentials.Download
459
Zendesk-HubSpot Ticket Sync AutomationAutomates synchronization of support tickets and contacts between Zendesk and HubSpot using their APIs. 460
Company Profile Extractor & AnalyzerAutomates extraction of company info from domains listed in Google Sheets. 461
RabbitMQ to SMS Alert SystemAn n8n workflow that listens to a RabbitMQ queue for temperature readings and sends SMS alerts via the Vonage API when a threshold is exceeded. It automates message processing using RabbitMQ trigger, conditional logic, and SMS notification.Download

WooCommerce Product CRUD WorkflowAutomates creating, updating, and retrieving WooCommerce products using n8n's WooCommerce node and API integration. Enables manual execution to add a product, update its stock, and fetch product details seamlessly.Download

WooCommerce to Mattermost Order AlertAutomates sending a message on Mattermost when a new WooCommerce order is created. Uses WooCommerce API trigger and Mattermost API for real-time order notifications, improving team awareness and response speed for e-commerce operations.Download
464
Export SQL Table to CSV FileAn n8n workflow that fetches data from a Microsoft SQL Server table and saves it as a CSV file. Utilizes Microsoft SQL API for querying, n8n spreadsheet node for CSV export, and supports further automation like emailing or uploading the file.Download

Urgent Bug Alert from Linear to SlackAutomates notifications for urgent bugs by triggering on Linear issue events, filtering by priority and label, transforming data, and sending alerts to Slack channels using Linear API, n8n workflow, and Slack API.Download
466
API JSON to Google Sheets & CSV ExportAutomates fetching JSON user data from randomuser.me via HTTP Request, then directly appends it into Google Sheets using Google Sheets API, and also converts selected data fields into a downloadable CSV file using n8n's Spreadsheet File node. Outlook Draft Email with Attachment AutomationAutomate creating, attaching files, and sending draft emails via Microsoft Outlook using n8n workflow. Integrates Microsoft Outlook API and HTTP Request node to fetch attachments, enabling streamlined email drafting and sending.Download

Sync Discord Events to Google CalendarAutomate syncing of Discord scheduled events to Google Calendar using Discord API and Google Calendar API. On a schedule, fetches events from a Discord server and creates or updates matching events in Google Calendar for seamless event management.Download

Google Sheets to Discord Message NotifierAutomates sending updated Google Sheets rows as formatted ASCII tables to a Discord channel using Google Sheets API, a custom JavaScript code node, and Discord webhooks. Ideal for real-time collaborative update notifications.Download

472
LLM Data Parser with Auto-fixingn8n workflow using Langchain with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini to parse structured data about US states and cities. Includes prompt setup, validation via a JSON schema, and an auto-fixing LLM output parser to ensure data correctness and reprocess invalid outputs.Download
473
Pinecone Vector DB Chat with Google DriveAn n8n workflow that loads files from Google Drive, splits text content, embeds chunks using OpenAI embeddings, and inserts them into a Pinecone vector index. Filters bot messages and posts AI replies in Slack channels.Download

Google Sheets to Mailchimp Subscriber SyncAutomates syncing email addresses from a Google Sheets range to a Mailchimp mailing list. Utilizes Google Sheets and Mailchimp APIs within n8n, triggered at set intervals to keep subscriber lists updated seamlessly.Download

564
Exponential Backoff Retry for Google APIsThis n8n workflow implements an exponential backoff strategy to handle rate limits and errors when interacting with Google APIs (e.g., Google Sheets). It uses n8n nodes including Google Sheets API via service account, code node for backoff logic, wait node for delays, and error handling to retry up to 5 times with increasing delays.Download
565
Export Postgres Data to Excel FileThis workflow connects to a PostgreSQL database to run a SQL query retrieving product names and EANs, converts the result into an Excel spreadsheet, and saves it as a binary XLS file locally. Utilizes Postgres node, Spreadsheet File node, and Write Binary File node in n8n.Download
566
AI Linux SysAdmin via SSH AutomationAn n8n workflow that enables an AI agent (GPT-4o via OpenAI API) to act as a Linux system administrator. It receives chat commands, interprets user intent for Linux VPS management, generates safe SSH commands, and executes them remotely using SSH node, enhancing VPS management automation.Download
567
WordPress Article Text-to-Speech AutomationAutomates retrieval of WordPress articles, generates summaries or transcriptions with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, converts text to speech using Eleven Labs API, uploads MP3 to WordPress, and updates the post. Integrates WordPress API, LangChain, OpenAI, and Eleven Labs TTS.Download
568
AI Video Generator with HeyGen & n8nAutomates AI video creation using HeyGen API within n8n. Input text, avatar, and voice IDs to generate and monitor video status. Utilizes HTTP Request, Wait, and If nodes for orchestration. Perfect for creating customizable AI avatar videos programmatically.Download
569
Automated n8n Workflow Backup to Google DriveThis n8n workflow automatically backs up all n8n workflows daily at 01:30 by retrieving them via the n8n API, encoding the data into JSON files, and uploading them to a specified Google Drive folder. Tech stack: n8n, n8n API, Google Drive API.Download
570
Google Doc Auto-Fill from Web FormThis workflow collects form input via n8n Form Trigger, copies a Google Docs template, and replaces placeholders with submitted form data using Google Drive and Google Docs APIs. Enables dynamic document generation from user-submitted fields.Download
571
Real Estate Appointment Voice ReminderAn automated workflow using Google Calendar API, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini for message creation, ElevenLabs Text-to-Speech API to generate voice reminders, and Gmail for sending MP3 voice appointment reminders. Designed for real estate agents to remind clients professionally.Download
572
Shopify Orders to Google Sheets SyncAutomates retrieving Shopify store orders using Shopify API, handles pagination with page_info, and appends/upserts order data (id, note, email, processed_at) into Google Sheets via Google Sheets API. Includes scheduling and manual triggers.Download
573
Squarespace to Mailchimp Contact SyncAutomates adding Squarespace newsletter signups to Mailchimp audience using Google Sheets and Mailchimp APIs. Scheduled or manual triggers ensure new contacts sync despite Squarespace-Mailchimp limitations, improving newsletter audience management.Download
574
Telegram Chinese Vocabulary Tutor BotAn n8n workflow automating a Telegram bot to tutor users in Chinese vocabulary using Google Sheets for word lists, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini via Langchain for interactive MCQs, with session memory and feedback. Ideal for language learners.Download
575
Shopify Automated Fulfillment WorkflowAn n8n workflow automating Shopify order fulfillment by fetching unfulfilled orders, filtering those older than 24 hours, retrieving fulfillment orders via Shopify API, and marking them fulfilled with customer notification. Uses Shopify REST API and n8n core nodes.Download
576
n8n AI Assistant for Tool DiscoveryAn n8n workflow integrating Langchain chat triggers, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, and n8n Multi-Channel Platform API to provide an AI assistant. It interacts with users' chat queries about n8n, dynamically looks up and executes relevant tools, delivering tailored, actionable responses on n8n usage and resources.Download
577
MediaMarkt Deals Email NotifierAutomates retrieval of MediaMarkt Spain deals using BrightData proxy, extracts and classifies deal info with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, generates HTML emails via n8n Document Generator, and emails personalized top deals based on user-selected categories. Notion To Do to Slack ReminderAutomates daily checks of Notion to-dos assigned to a specific user, sending reminders via Slack DMs. Utilizes Notion API for task retrieval and Slack API for messaging, triggered every morning at 8AM to streamline task management and notifications.Download
580
Weekly Missing Project Budget AlertAutomates weekly monitoring of open external projects with zero budgeted cost from a MySQL database. 581

582
Automated Resume Screener from Gmail to SheetsThis n8n workflow automates screening resumes received as email attachments in Gmail. Tech stack: Gmail API, Google Sheets API, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, Langchain integration.Download

Incident Resolution & Notification AutomationAutomates incident status updates by integrating PagerDuty, Jira, and Mattermost via n8n. Error Notification via Mattermost & TwilioAn n8n workflow that triggers on errors, sends detailed error notifications to Mattermost, and then sends an SMS alert via Twilio. Upload Photo to SharePoint via Microsoft GraphAutomates uploading a photo to a SharePoint folder using Microsoft Graph API with OAuth2 client credentials. Utilizes HTTP Request and Set nodes in n8n to authenticate, fetch test image, set destination, and upload binary data securely.Download
587

588
Facebook Lead Ads to KlickTipp AutomationAutomates lead capture from Facebook Lead Ads into KlickTipp CRM. Utilizes Facebook Lead Ads Trigger and KlickTipp API nodes in n8n to sync lead data with mapped custom fields and tags for personalized email campaigns and segmentation.Download

Google Autocomplete Keyword Generator A-ZAn n8n workflow that generates keyword queries by appending each letter A-Z to a base keyword, queries Google Autocomplete API to retrieve popular search suggestions, and aggregates results. Bing Copilot Search Results SummarizerAutomates extraction and summarization of Bing Copilot search results using Bright Data API for data scraping and Google Gemini AI for natural language processing and structured data formatting. OpenAI Image Generator via Web FormAn n8n workflow that generates images using OpenAI's GPT-Image-1 model. Uses OpenAI API and n8n form/webhook nodes.Download

Twitter Sentiment Filter & Strapi SyncAutomates fetching recent English tweets about Strapi or n8n.io every 30 mins, filters out retweets/old tweets, analyzes sentiment using Google Cloud Natural Language API, and stores only positive sentiment tweets and form submissions into a Strapi CMS collection.Download
687

Auto Resume Disabled n8n WorkflowsAn n8n workflow that automatically resumes disabled workflows tagged with 'auto_resume:true' every 4 hours using n8n API nodes, schedule triggers, and filters. Ensures continuous automation by activating paused workflows in n8n.Download
791
Google Drive PDF RAG with AI ChatAutomates Google Drive folder monitoring to download PDFs, extract and clean text, generate embeddings with Google Gemini, store them in Pinecone vector DB, and enable AI chat queries with context via OpenRouter and Langchain nodes for retrieval-augmented generation.Download
792
YouTube Video AI Summaries to DiscordAutomates fetching new YouTube videos from a channel's RSS feed, retrieves English captions via YouTube API with OAuth2, summarizes transcript content using OpenAI's GPT-3.5, and posts concise bullet-point summaries with video links to a Discord channel via webhook.Download
793
LinkedIn Profile URL FinderAutomates finding LinkedIn profile URLs from names stored in Google Sheets using Google Sheets API and Airtop's AI search API. Fetches names, searches Google for LinkedIn URLs, parses results, and updates the sheet, streamlining contact enrichment for recruiters and sales.Download
794
WhatsApp & Asana Customer Support AutomationAutomates customer support by capturing form data via n8n form trigger, sending confirmation messages through WhatsApp Business Cloud API, and creating support tickets in Asana task management. 795
Gmail Automation WorkflowAn n8n workflow automating Gmail operations like sending, replying, getting emails, and waiting for responses using Gmail OAuth2 API. Integrates n8n's langchain MCP trigger for AI-driven email handling and dynamic message management.Download
796
Sync New Clients from Notion to ClockifyAutomate client management by syncing new clients from a Notion database to Clockify workspace using n8n. Utilizes Notion API as trigger and Clockify API to add clients automatically, streamlining project tracking setup.Download
797
YouTube Video Transcript SummarizerAutomates summarization of YouTube video transcripts using SearchApi.io for transcript retrieval and OpenAI GPT-4o-mini model via Langchain in n8n. Converts video_id input into concise video content summaries for easy consumption.Download
798
AI Movie Recommendation Agent with MongoDBAn AI-driven movie recommendation chatbot using OpenAI GPT and MongoDB aggregation. It receives user chat input, queries a MongoDB movies collection with AI-generated aggregation pipelines, provides recommendations, and allows saving favorite movies. AI-Powered Outlook Email Reply AssistantAutomates email replies by integrating Microsoft Outlook and OpenAI GPT-4o-mini via n8n. Filters emails from specific sender, generates personalized replies in your style, and drafts or sends replies automatically, enhancing email productivity.Download

Client Feedback AI Summary & Social PostAutomates client feedback processing using n8n workflow with Deepseek AI API for analysis, email for report delivery, and Telegram for social media draft sharing. Summarizes positives, suggests improvements, and drafts social posts from feedback.Download
801
Daily Google Calendar Meetings to TelegramAutomates sending a daily list of Google Calendar meetings via Telegram using Google Calendar and Telegram APIs in n8n. Triggered every morning at 6 AM, it retrieves today's meetings, formats details, and messages them to your Telegram user.Download

Slack Command to Generate Google Meet LinksAutomate instant Google Meet link creation from Slack using n8n. GitHub Issues to Telegram NotifierAutomates fetching open GitHub issues labeled 'Bug' from a specified repo every 10 minutes, filters by comments count, and sends new issue alerts via Telegram bot. Utilizes GitHub API, n8n automation, and Telegram API for real-time notifications.Download

807
AI Tweet Generator with Hashtag & AirtableGenerates short tweets including random tech hashtags using OpenAI's text-davinci-001 API, then stores results in Airtable. Uses n8n for workflow orchestration with manual trigger, function nodes, HTTP request, and Airtable node.Download
808
Text-to-Speech Audio Generator with OpenAIAn n8n workflow that converts text to audio using OpenAI's text-to-speech API. 809
Telegram Error Notification for n8nAn n8n workflow to send real-time error alerts via Telegram bot. Uses n8n's Error Trigger node linked to a Telegram node with bot token and chat ID. Notifies workflow name, execution time, error details, and last executed node for easy monitoring.Download
810
Automated Web Server Uptime MonitorAn n8n workflow that monitors web server availability every minute. SERPBear SEO Analytics with AI InsightsAutomates fetching SEO keyword rankings from SERPBear API, analyzes trends and performance with AI via OpenRouter, and saves actionable insights to Baserow database. It sets up Telegram webhooks and processes incoming messages with AI capabilities: transcribes voice to text, analyzes images with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, classifies text messages, and routes them accordingly. Integrates Telegram API, Langchain OpenAI nodes, and n8n automation.Download

Telegram PDF RAG Chatbot with PineconeAn n8n workflow that automates processing PDFs sent via Telegram by extracting, chunking, embedding with OpenAI, and storing in Pinecone vector DB. Enables retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) chat using Groq LLaMA-3.1-70b model for precise answers from uploaded documents.Download
1341
Text Automation via Apple Shortcuts & OpenAIAn n8n workflow integrating Apple Shortcuts with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini models to automate text tasks: translate (English/Spanish), grammar correction, and text length adjustments. 1342

It updates sheets with company business areas, offers, models, and ideal customer profiles automatically.Download

SendGrid Contact Management WorkflowAutomates creating, updating, and retrieving contacts using SendGrid API within n8n. Utilizes manual trigger, SendGrid node for contact resource operations including adding first and last names, and fetching contact by email. Ideal for managing email lists.Download
1461
n8n Workflow Sync to Notion DatabaseAutomates syncing of n8n workflows tagged 'sync-to-notion' with a Notion database. Uses n8n API to fetch workflows every 15 mins, then queries and updates or adds corresponding pages in Notion via Notion API. Ideal for workflow management and monitoring.Download
1462
G Suite Admin User Management WorkflowAutomate creation, updating, and retrieval of G Suite users using the n8n G Suite Admin node with OAuth2 authentication. Ideal for managing Google Workspace users programmatically within n8n workflows.Download
1463
Gmail Error Notification WorkflowAn n8n workflow that triggers on errors in other workflows and sends an email alert via Gmail API with error details. Set up with Gmail OAuth2 credentials and target email to receive notifications about workflow failures for quick troubleshooting.Download
1464
Set Default Error Workflow in n8nAutomates updating the default error workflow ID in n8n workflows stored in a Postgres DB. Uses n8n API to fetch workflows, filters by tags, and updates workflow settings via Postgres node. Scheduled every 4 hours or manually triggered.Download
1465
Country Info Lookup via GraphQL APIAn n8n workflow that retrieves country details (name, phone code, emoji) using a GraphQL query to the countries.trevorblades.com API. It accepts a country code from a webhook, processes the response, and returns a formatted summary string.Download
1466
HighLevel Contact Address VerifierAutomates verification of mailing addresses from HighLevel CRM contacts using Lob API. It triggers via webhook, verifies address deliverability, and tags contacts in HighLevel accordingly for follow-up or confirmation. Integrates HighLevel CRM, n8n workflow, and Lob address verification API.Download
1467
Grist Record Transfer with ConfirmationAn n8n workflow that uses a Webhook and Grist API to transfer records from a source to a destination table only when a 'Confirmed' boolean flag is true. It prevents duplicate entries by checking existing records before creating new ones, ensuring manual confirmation triggers the process.Download
1468
XML to JSON Conversion APIAn n8n workflow webhook that converts uploaded XML files or XML text payloads into JSON. Uses n8n's Extract From File and XML nodes, supports binary file uploads and text input, sends JSON responses, and logs errors to Slack.Download
1469
Dynamic NASA API Key CredentialsAn n8n workflow demonstrating how to dynamically set NASA API credentials using form input expressions. Utilizes n8n Form Trigger, NASA API node, and Respond to Webhook to fetch and redirect to NASA's picture of the day. Great for learning dynamic credential handling.Download
1470
Email Validation & Domain Extraction WorkflowAn n8n workflow that validates email addresses and extracts domains using native functions. It uses n8n's manual trigger, random data generator for sample emails, and set node for processing. Ideal for quick email checks in automated processes.Download
1471
Automated Mautic Contact Unsubscribe via GmailThis n8n workflow automates unsubscribing contacts in Mautic based on unsubscribe emails received in Gmail. It uses Gmail API to trigger on new emails, parses sender emails, searches Mautic contacts via Mautic API, updates contact segments (unsubscribe and newsletter), and replies with a confirmation message.Download
1472
Redis Workflow Lock for Scheduled RunsAn n8n workflow that uses Redis to lock execution status, preventing concurrent runs of a main workflow triggered on a set schedule. It checks and updates workflow state as 'running' or 'idle' to ensure serialized runs, using scheduleTrigger, Redis, and executeWorkflow nodes.Download
1473
FlutterFlow Low-Code API Endpointn8n workflow provides a low-code API endpoint for FlutterFlow apps using webhooks, a customer datastore node, data aggregation, and response formatting. Easily customize with your database and serve GET requests for app data integration.Download
1474
DOCX to PDF Conversion WorkflowAn n8n workflow that converts DOCX files to PDF using ConvertAPI service. It fetches a DOCX file from a URL, sends it to ConvertAPI with query authentication, and saves the resulting PDF locally. Ideal for automated document format conversion.Download
1475
Scheduled Website Scraper with Scrappey APIAn automated workflow using n8n that triggers on schedule to scrape any website via the Scrappey API, avoiding anti-bot blocks. It uses n8n's Schedule Trigger, HTTP Request node with Scrappey API, and customizable URL input for scalable web scraping tasks.Download
1476
XLSX to PDF Conversion WorkflowAutomates downloading an XLSX file, converts it to PDF using ConvertAPI's API, and saves the PDF locally. Utilizes n8n, HTTP Requests, and file handling nodes to streamline document format conversion.Download
1477
PPTX to PDF Conversion WorkflowAn n8n workflow that automates downloading a PPTX file, converting it to PDF using ConvertAPI's API, and saving the result locally. Utilizes HTTP Request nodes and file system operations with authentication via ConvertAPI query credentials.Download
1478
PDF Password Protect and Save WorkflowAn n8n automation workflow that downloads a PDF, applies password protection using ConvertAPI, saves it locally, and uploads to Google Drive. Utilizes ConvertAPI for PDF processing and Google Drive API for cloud storage.Download
1479
Webpage to PDF ConverterConvert any webpage URL into a downloadable PDF file using ConvertAPI via HTTP request, with automated file saving on disk, triggered manually in n8n workflow.Download
1480
HTML to PDF Conversion with ConvertAPIAutomates conversion of a simple HTML document to PDF using ConvertAPI via HTTP request, with file handling in n8n. Demonstrates use of manual trigger, code node for binary conversion, and authenticated API request to create a PDF file.Download
1481
Image to PDF Conversion WorkflowAn n8n workflow that downloads an image from a URL, converts it to PDF using ConvertAPI, then saves the PDF locally. Utilizes HTTP Request node with ConvertAPI for file conversion, manual trigger to start, and file system write node for output.Download
1482
PDF to PDF/A Conversion WorkflowAutomates downloading a PDF file, converting it to the PDF/A standard using ConvertAPI, and saving the result locally. Utilizes n8n, HTTP Request nodes, and ConvertAPI's authenticated REST API for file conversion.Download
1483
Systeme.io Contacts & Tags ManagementAutomate retrieval and management of contacts and tags using Systeme.io API in n8n. Includes pagination and rate limiting handling for full data sync, plus batch adding contacts with custom fields via HTTP requests.Download
1484
Zigbee2MQTT Weekly Backup to SFTPAutomates weekly Zigbee2MQTT backups by triggering an MQTT request every Monday at 2:45 AM, receiving the base64 backup response, converting it to a ZIP file, and uploading it securely to an SFTP server. Utilizes MQTT, SFTP, JSON parsing, and n8n scheduling.Download
1485
TOTP 2FA Code Validation WorkflowAn n8n workflow to validate 6-digit TOTP codes using Python in a function node without creating credentials. It runs a time-based one-time password algorithm for 2FA verification, suitable for secure authentication systems.Download
1486
Todoist Task Prioritization with OpenAIAutomates task prioritization in Todoist using a scheduled n8n workflow. It fetches inbox tasks, categorizes them to projects via OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, and updates their priority accordingly. Utilizes Todoist API, OpenAI API, and n8n automation platform.Download
1487
Image Overlay Watermark AutomationAutomates overlaying a watermark or logo image onto a background image using n8n nodes like HTTP Request, Edit Image, and Code. Downloads images, extracts metadata, calculates center position, and composites them. Useful for branding and watermarking.Download
1488
Fastmail Masked Email GeneratorAn n8n workflow that creates disposable masked email addresses via Fastmail's JMAP API. Triggered by a webhook, it authenticates using HTTP header credentials, processes input state and description, generates a masked email, and responds with the details. Ideal for privacy and testing integrations.Download
1489
Xero Webhook Verification & FileMaker SyncAutomatically verifies Xero webhook payloads using HMAC SHA256 and syncs data to FileMaker. Utilizes n8n's webhook, crypto, and FileMaker nodes to securely validate and store webhook events with custom script execution.Download
1490
Access Token Management with Static DataAn n8n workflow to manage expiring API access tokens using static data storage. 1491

BlueSky Auto Post from RSS FeedAutomates posting new RSS feed items to BlueSky social. Uses BlueSky API (session creation, image upload, post creation) and n8n workflow nodes to download images, upload blobs, and create posts with text, images, and metadata. Ideal for content syndication.Download

Autopilot to Airtable Contact SyncAn n8n workflow that triggers on new Autopilot contacts, extracts their first name, last name, and email, and appends them to an Airtable base. Utilizes Autopilot API for contact events and Airtable API to store contact data for easy CRM management.Download

1591
Book Data Scraper to Google SheetsAn n8n workflow that scrapes book details from a website using HTTP request to Jina.ai endpoint, extracts structured info with OpenAI-powered Langchain nodes, and appends data (title, price, availability, image, link) into Google Sheets. 1592
LangChain Workflow Retriever with OpenAI QAAn n8n workflow integrating LangChain and OpenAI API to retrieve and query data from another n8n workflow by ID. It uses LangChain's Workflow Retriever and Retrieval QA Chain with an OpenAI Chat model to answer questions based on workflow data.Download

Typeform Feedback Sentiment AlertAutomates sentiment analysis on Typeform event feedback using AWS Comprehend and sends negative feedback alerts to Mattermost. Integrates Typeform API, AWS Comprehend for sentiment detection, and Mattermost API for messaging.Download
1594
Automated Website Change Spy & Email AlertsAn n8n workflow that automates detecting changes on specified websites using Firecrawl scraping API, compares content over a day, uses OpenAI GPT-4 models to analyze differences, and conditionally sends detailed Gmail alerts. TikTok Video Downloader & Google Drive UploaderAutomate downloading TikTok videos without watermarks using HTTP requests and HTML parsing. Integrates TikTok website, JavaScript code node, and Google Drive API.Download

Telegram Meetup Scheduler AI BotAn n8n workflow integrating Telegram Bot API, Google Sheets, and OpenRouter AI to provide meetup scheduling assistance. n8n Workflow Outdated Node CheckerChecks n8n workflows for nodes with outdated versions by comparing each node's type and version to the latest available via the n8n API. Uses n8n's HTTP Request, Aggregate, If, and Code nodes with n8n API key authentication to identify nodes needing updates.Download
1699
Contabo VPS Snapshot AutomationAutomates daily backup snapshots for Contabo VPS instances using Contabo API, UUIDGenerator for unique request IDs, and n8n nodes. Handles authorization, instance listing, snapshot checking, deletion, and creation with scheduled and manual triggers.Download
1700
Webhook.site to Local n8n RelayAutomates receiving public webhooks via webhook.site API and forwards them to a local n8n workflow. Utilizes schedule triggers, key-value storage (@horka.tv/n8n-nodes-storage-kv), HTTP requests, and custom JavaScript for filtering and processing. Ideal for testing and local webhook processing.Download
1701
Fastmail Masked Email ManagementAn n8n workflow leveraging Fastmail API to manage masked email addresses: create, update, delete, and list. It uses HTTP Request nodes with Fastmail JMAP API, a webhook secured by basic auth, and generates an interactive HTML table for email states.Download
1702
Customer.io Unsubscribe Event TriggerAn n8n workflow that uses the Customer.io Trigger node to automatically capture and respond to customer unsubscribes in real time via Customer.io API, enabling automated actions upon unsubscribe events.Download
1703
MP4 to Text Transcript with Eleven Labs APIAutomates transcription of local MP4 video files into text using Eleven Labs speech-to-text API. Uses n8n workflow with local file reading and HTTP Request nodes for audio transcription, enabling seamless offline media processing.Download
1704
Redis Locking Workflow for Webhook ConcurrencyAn n8n workflow that uses Redis to implement distributed locking for webhook handling, preventing concurrent or duplicate executions. It parses Slack webhook payloads, checks and acquires Redis locks, conditionally executes workflows, and releases locks after completion.Download
1705
n8n Tag-to-Folder Workflow OrganizerAutomates organization of n8n workflows by converting tags into folders via n8n API. Uses n8n HTTP Request, Form Trigger, and Code nodes to login, fetch tags, create folders, and move workflows. Simplifies project management for personal owned projects.Download
1706
Automated RSS to Google Sheets UpdaterAn n8n workflow that periodically reads RSS feed URLs from a Google Sheet, fetches and filters recent news (last 3 days), converts content from HTML to Markdown, updates and deletes entries in a Google Sheet to maintain fresh news data. Uses Google Sheets API, RSS feed reader, and custom JavaScript code.Download
1707
Paul Graham Essays Scraper & QA ChatAutomates scraping of Paul Graham's essays from his website, processes texts using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, and stores embeddings in Milvus vector DB. Enables QA chat with the indexed essays via LangChain nodes in n8n workflow.Download
1708
Linux Filesystem MCP ServerAn n8n workflow implementing a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Linux filesystem. It enables remote MCP clients to list, search, read, create directories and files securely on the host machine using n8n's MCP trigger and Execute Command tools. Ideal for file management automation.Download
1709
SQLite MCP Server for Database CRUDSelf-hosted n8n workflow acting as an MCP server to securely manage SQLite DB via CRUD operations. Utilizes SQLite3 Node.js lib, MCP server trigger, and Code + custom workflow tools for read, insert, update. Ideal for business intelligence tasks.Download
1710
PayPal Payment Capture & Template DeliveryAn n8n workflow to handle PayPal NVP SOAP webhook for payment captures, fetch order details using PayPal API with OAuth2, filter specific product purchases, convert JSON template to file, and email the purchased workflow template to customers. Tech stack includes PayPal API, HTTP Requests, webhooks, and email node.Download
1711
Retell Voice Agent Booking WebhookAn n8n workflow that connects Retell AI Voice Agents with custom logic via webhooks. It captures booking requests, processes data, and sends confirmation responses in real-time. Tech stack includes Retell AI, n8n webhook and respond nodes, with potential for API integrations and AI enhancements.Download
1712
Encrypted WhatsApp Flow Handlern8n workflow for secure WhatsApp interactions using hybrid RSA-AES decryption. It decrypts encrypted webhook payloads, parses user state ('screen'), applies conditional routing, extracts appointment or seat data, then encrypts and responds via API. Utilizes n8n nodes, Node.js Crypto, and webhook integration.Download
1713
Google News RSS Decoder to Clean Article LinksAn n8n workflow that reads Google News RSS feeds (customizable by language), decodes obfuscated Google News URLs via reverse-engineered POST requests, and outputs clean, direct article links. Uses RSS Feed, HTTP Request, HTML extraction, and JavaScript code nodes.Download

Squarespace to Shopify Customer Sync via Google SheetsAutomates conversion of Squarespace profile data to Shopify customer format using Google Sheets for data handling. Uses n8n webhook to receive submissions, processes data in batches, and updates Shopify customers and Squarespace profiles in Google Sheets seamlessly.Download
1715
Automated Bluesky Thread CreatorAn n8n workflow that authenticates to Bluesky via API and automates creation of threaded posts (initial post, replies, siblings) on schedule. Uses Bluesky's xrpc API with HTTP Request and JavaScript code nodes to build and post multi-level conversation threads daily at 9 AM.Download
1716
Automated Price Tracker and NotifierThis n8n workflow automates monitoring product prices across multiple web pages using HTTP requests and CSS selectors for data extraction. It compares current prices with stored data and sends email alerts via SMTP for price drops or extraction issues.Download

Docker InfluxDB WHMCS API BackendAutomates Docker-based InfluxDB container management for WHMCS/WISECP. 1718
Centroid Calculator for Vector SetsAn n8n workflow that receives vector arrays via webhook, validates uniform dimensions, computes their centroid by averaging each component, and returns the result. Uses n8n's Webhook, Set, Code, and Respond nodes for API-driven vector centroid calculations.Download
1719
Crop Image Anomaly Detection WorkflowAn n8n workflow detecting anomalous crop images using Voyage.ai embeddings and Qdrant vector search. Zammad Data Export to ExcelAn n8n workflow that exports users, roles, groups, and organizations from Zammad via API calls authenticated by token. It transforms data into universal objects and converts them into Excel files (XLSX). Ideal for helpdesk admin reporting and data management.Download

MySQL Execution History Purge WorkflowAutomates deletion of MySQL n8n execution logs older than 30 days to maintain database performance. Utilizes n8n's Cron trigger and MySQL node with SQL DELETE queries. Useful for n8n users managing execution history retention.Download

JSON File Creator from Data ObjectThis n8n workflow generates example JSON data, converts it to a binary buffer, encodes it in base64, and writes it to a local JSON file using built-in function and file nodes. Useful for simple data export automation without external APIs.Download
1946
Standup Bot Config Readern8n workflow that reads a JSON configuration file for a Standup Bot from the local filesystem and converts it to JSON format for further processing. Uses n8n's File and Move Binary Data nodes to trigger and handle config data reading and parsing.Download
1947
Twitter Auto Poster with Loop ControlThis n8n workflow posts "Hello from n8n!" to Twitter using Twitter OAuth1 API credentials. It triggers manually, then loops posting tweets until the run count reaches 4, controlled by an IF node. Includes a NoOp node for alternate flow.Download
1948
Standup Bot Config OverrideAn n8n workflow to manually update and save the Standup Bot configuration by converting JSON to binary and writing it to a local file. Utilizes n8n built-in nodes: Manual Trigger, Move Binary Data, and Write Binary File.Download
1949
Simple HTML Response WebhookAn n8n workflow that creates a webhook endpoint (/my-form) which responds with a static HTML page styled using Bootstrap 5. It uses n8n's Webhook and Respond to Webhook nodes to deliver a basic "Hello, world!" webpage upon HTTP request.Download
1950
Conditional Close Date Settern8n workflow to set or validate a 'Close Date'. Uses manual trigger, regex check, and date handling to either retain an original fixed date or update it to 3 weeks from today. Employs built-in n8n nodes only, for date automation tasks.Download
1951
Get Today's Date and WeekdayAn n8n workflow using a Manual Trigger and Function node to output the current ISO date and weekday name in JavaScript. Useful for initiating date-based automation or logging within n8n without external API calls.Download
1952
Sum USD Amounts from Mock DataAn n8n workflow that sums USD amounts from mocked JSON data using Function nodes. It manually triggers, generates sample amounts, and calculates their total. Utilizes n8n core nodes without external APIs. Ideal for simple data aggregation demonstrations.Download
1953
Command Output Parsing and Conditional CheckAn n8n workflow that executes a shell command returning JSON, parses the output, transforms it into flow data, and conditionally branches using an IF node based on parsed boolean value. Utilizes Execute Command, Function Item, and IF nodes.Download
1954
Quickstart Demo: Customer Data Fetch & FormatAn introductory n8n workflow demonstrating how to fetch fake customer data from the n8nTrainingCustomerDatastore node, then transform and map it into cleaner fields using the Set node. Uses manual trigger for testing. Great for beginners learning API data extraction and manipulation.Download
1955
Simple API Endpoint for Google Search URLCreates a lightweight API using n8n with Webhook and Respond to Webhook nodes that generates a Google search URL from query parameters (first and last names). Perfect for beginners learning to create API endpoints. Tech stack: n8n workflow, HTTP webhook.Download
1956
Fetch and Count Customers from n8n Training DBThis n8n workflow manually triggers retrieval of all customer records from the n8n Training Customer Datastore using the built-in n8nTrainingCustomerDatastore node, then counts the total number of customers. Ideal for simple database fetch and count automation within n8n.Download
1957
Scheduled Discord Meme PosterAn n8n workflow that automates posting memes to Discord channels using Discord Webhooks, triggered by cron schedules set for specific weekdays and intervals. It leverages n8n's Cron and Discord nodes to send customized memes on Wednesdays, Fridays, and every 30 minutes.Download
1958
Discord Message SenderSimple n8n workflow sending a 'Hello World!' message to a Discord channel via webhook API. Triggered manually, it demonstrates basic Discord integration using n8n's built-in Discord node and webhook URI.Download
1959
Simple XML to JSON ConversionAn n8n workflow that converts a hardcoded XML string to JSON format using the built-in XML node. Ideal for learning XML parsing in n8n. Uses n8n core nodes: Manual Trigger, Set, and XML parsing nodes.Download
1960
Manual Trigger to Postgres Data FetchWorkflow triggered manually to execute a SELECT query on a PostgreSQL database using n8n's Postgres node, retrieving all records from a specified table. Useful for simple database querying and testing integrations.Download
1961
AWS SNS Test Message SenderAn n8n workflow that sends a test message to an AWS SNS topic using a manual trigger. It integrates n8n with AWS SNS API to automate notification sending for testing or alerting purposes.Download
1962
Manual Trigger MongoDB Data InserterAn n8n workflow triggered manually to insert predefined key-value data into a MongoDB collection. Utilizes n8n's Manual Trigger, Set, and MongoDB nodes for simple data insertion tasks.Download
1963
Simple Email Sender via MailgunAn n8n workflow that sends an email using the Mailgun API triggered manually. It includes a manual trigger node and a Mailgun node to dispatch emails with specified subject, sender, and recipient.Download
1964
Redis Key-Value Retrieval TriggerAn n8n workflow that triggers manually and retrieves the value of a specified Redis key using Redis API. Uses n8n's Manual Trigger and Redis nodes to fetch the value of key 'hello' from a Redis instance.Download
1965
Trigger Folder Access in BoxThis n8n workflow triggers manually and connects to the Box API via OAuth2 to access metadata of a specific folder named 'n8n-rocks'. It demonstrates basic integration of manual trigger and Box cloud storage for folder resource retrieval.Download
1966
Manual Date ParserAn n8n workflow that triggers manually and converts a specified date string ('14/02/2020') into a date object using n8n's Date & Time node. Useful for beginners learning to handle date parsing and transformations without external APIs.Download
1967
Manual Trigger to Read Local Binary FileAn n8n workflow that manually triggers the reading of a local binary file (e.g., image) from a specified path using the built-in Read Binary File node. Useful for workflows involving local file processing.Download
1968
Manual Trigger to Read JPG FilesAn n8n workflow that manually triggers a process to read all .jpg files from the /data/lol/ directory using the Read Binary Files node. Useful for workflows requiring batch processing of image files on local storage.Download
1969
Simple Key Renaming WorkflowAn n8n workflow triggered manually that sets a key-value pair and renames the key from 'key' to 'newkey'. Uses native n8n nodes: Manual Trigger, Set, and Rename Keys. Demonstrates basic data transformation within n8n.Download
1970
RSS Feed Trigger WorkflowAn n8n workflow that triggers on manual execution and reads an RSS feed from https://failedmachine.com/rss/. Uses n8n's Manual Trigger and RSS Feed Read nodes to fetch and process RSS data for automation.Download
1971
Manual Trigger Email SenderAn n8n workflow that sends an email upon manual execution. It uses the built-in Manual Trigger and Email Send nodes, leveraging SMTP credentials to dispatch a predefined message. Ideal for testing or simple email notifications.Download
1972
MySQL Table Setup and Insert Demon8n workflow creating a MySQL table 'test', inserting a row with id and name using MySQL node and Set node, triggered manually. Demonstrates basic MySQL operations automation in n8n with MySQL credentials.Download
1973
Sequential API Requests with ReqResAn n8n workflow automating sequential HTTP calls to the ReqRes API: GET users, POST to create a user, and PATCH to update a user. Demonstrates chaining of REST API requests using n8n’s Manual Trigger and HTTP Request nodes for testing and learning API interactions.Download
1974
SSE Stream ListenerAn n8n workflow that listens to Server-Sent Events (SSE) from a specified URL using the built-in SSE Trigger node. Useful for real-time event streaming and automation based on live web data.Download
1975
Merge Greetings with Names by LanguageAn n8n workflow that combines sample datasets of names and greetings based on their language code. It uses JavaScript code nodes to provide data samples and a merge node to join them by 'language'. Useful for basic multi-language greeting generation.Download
1976
CSV Spreadsheet ReaderAn n8n workflow that reads a CSV spreadsheet file from local storage using the Read Binary File and Spreadsheet File nodes to parse and process data on manual trigger.Download
1977
Spotify Track FetcherAn n8n workflow that retrieves detailed data for a specific Spotify track using Spotify's OAuth2 API upon manual execution.Download
1978
Batch Loop with Conditional StopAn n8n workflow that generates 10 items, processes them one by one in batches of size 1, and conditionally stops the loop after the 6th item. Uses core n8n nodes: Manual Trigger, Function, SplitInBatches, IF condition, and Set to signal loop end.Download
1979
n8n itemMatching() Data Linking ExampleDemonstrates using n8n's itemMatching() in Code node (Python) to restore linked email data from a customer datastore. Utilizes n8n Training Customer Datastore, Manual Trigger, Set node to isolate fields, and Python code for data retrieval and matching.Download
1980
Local DateTime Retrieval WorkflowThis n8n workflow uses a manual trigger and a function node with moment.js to fetch and format the current local datetime based on an environment timezone variable. It outputs detailed datetime components for flexible usage.Download
1981
Create Array from Mock Data ItemsAn n8n workflow that generates mock JSON data objects and consolidates them into a single array object using JavaScript functions inside n8n. Useful for testing and prototyping data handling workflows without external APIs.Download
1982
Spanish Text Case and Replace Demon8n workflow demonstrating string manipulations like toLowerCase, toUpperCase and replace on Spanish text using executeCommand nodes triggered manually. Ideal for beginners learning text processing in n8n with simple command line snippets.Download
1983
Assign Variables Using Set NodeA simple n8n workflow demonstrating how to assign values to variables of different types (number, string, boolean) using the Set node triggered manually. Ideal for beginners learning value assignment in n8n automation.Download
1984
Manual Trigger with Crypto Node DemoThis n8n workflow demonstrates a manual trigger that executes a Crypto node to process a simple string ('n8n rocks!'). It uses n8n's built-in manual trigger and crypto encryption tools for basic cryptographic operations. Ideal for learning node chaining and crypto usage.Download
1985
Basic Conditional Workflow DemoAn n8n workflow demonstrating manual trigger, creation of test data, conditional branching based on 'id' field, and setting different string values. Uses n8n native nodes: Manual Trigger, Function, IF condition, and Set nodes for flow control and data assignment.Download
1986
Manual Trigger to Execute WorkflowA simple n8n workflow that uses a manual trigger node to initiate the execution of another predefined workflow by its ID. Utilizes n8n's internal executeWorkflow node to chain workflows. Ideal for manual control and testing purposes.Download
1987
ID-Based Conditional Set WorkflowAn n8n workflow using manual trigger, function, and switch nodes to map IDs (0,1,2) to specific string values (n8n, nodemation, nathan). It demonstrates conditional branching and data transformation without external APIs.Download
1988
Basic Array Mapper WorkflowSimple n8n workflow using Function nodes to generate mock array data and map each element into individual JSON objects. Demonstrates basic data transformation without external APIs or integrations.Download
1989
Create JSON Items from Mock DataAn n8n workflow that generates a mock list of user objects and converts them into individual JSON items using Function nodes. Useful for testing or prototyping JSON data processing without external APIs.Download
